div.h3: Implementation-Grade State Transitions and Memory Layouts

g.text: Intel x86-64 Page Table Entry (PTE) Layout
Accessed; Set by Hardware MMU on Read/Write
Dirty; Set by Hardware MMU on Write Access

div.p: The Accessed (A) and Dirty (D) bits are set by hardware. The Operating System is responsible for clearing these bits during the Clock Algorithm's sweep to reset the 'Second Chance' timer.
